query: SELECT bookTitle, authorName FROM book_profiles WHERE authorName IN ('Robert B Cialdini', 'Robert B. Cialdini', 'Robert Cialdini', 'Richard H Thaler', 'Richard H. Thaler', 'Steven Hawking', 'Stephen Hawking', 'Founders Pocket Guide', 'Stephen Poland') ORDER BY authorName, bookTitle;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT bookTitle, authorName FROM book_profiles WHERE authorName IN ('Robert B Cialdini', 'Robert B. Cialdini', 'Robert Cialdini', 'Richard H Thaler', 'Richard H. Thaler', 'Steven Hawking', 'Stephen Hawking', 'Founders Pocket Guide', 'Stephen Poland') ORDER BY authorName, bookTitle;

rows.bookTitle: Misbehaving The Making of Behavior Economics by Richard H. Thaler

bookTitle	authorName
Founder\u2019s Pocket Guide	Founders Pocket Guide
